welcomeDesc: Please create or select a workspace on the left to start chatting with AI
startNewConv: Enter a message below to start a new conversation
inputPlaceholder: Type a message (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chooseWorkspace: Please select or create a workspace on the left first...
agentConnectFailed: Agent connection failed, click above to retry...
agentError: Agent connection anomaly, unable to send message
disclaimer: Flock Agent · AI may make mistakes. Please verify important info.

approval.title: Tool Call Request
approval.descRead: Read-only operation, will not modify any files
approval.descExec: Will execute system commands, please verify carefully

workspace.officeDesc: This is a {{ext}} office document. For the most perfect and lossless layout, please use the system default software to open and edit it directly.
workspace.officeTip: 💡 Tip: After editing and saving in local Office / WPS, the workspace will automatically sync in real time.
workspace.fallbackDesc: This is a {{ext}} file and is not currently supported for direct preview within the app.
workspace.deleteFileConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the {{type}} "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

takeover.title: Your Action Required
takeover.hint: Please complete the action in the remote desktop on the right, then click "Continue":
